name: lgarret/health-check-wordpress
description: WordPress plugin providing a /wp-json/health-check/v1/health endpoint to monitor application and dependency status

scripts.dev:cli: docker compose -f dev/docker-compose.yml exec wpcli wp --path=/var/www/html
scripts.dev:cache-clear: docker compose -f dev/docker-compose.yml exec wpcli wp health cache clear --path=/var/www/html

scripts-descriptions.cs-check: Check code style without making changes.
scripts-descriptions.release: Bump version, tag and push to trigger the CI release workflow.
scripts-descriptions.dev:up: Start the local WordPress dev environment (installs & activates the plugin, idempotent).
scripts-descriptions.dev:down: Stop the local dev environment (keeps the database and WordPress volumes).
scripts-descriptions.dev:destroy: Stop the local dev environment and wipe all its data.
scripts-descriptions.dev:cli: Run a wp-cli command in the dev environment, e.g. composer dev:cli -- plugin list.
scripts-descriptions.dev:cache-clear: Clear the cached health check result in the dev environment.
